elements.text:
Figure 26.5-1C. Basic wind speeds for Risk Category III buildings and other structures.

This figure shows a wind speed map of the United States displaying basic wind speeds for Risk Category III buildings and other structures. The map uses contour lines and shaded regions to indicate different wind speed zones, with values given in both mph and m/s (in parentheses) for 3-second gust wind speeds at 33 ft above ground for Exposure Category C.

[Structured: {"type":"map","geography":"Continental United States including Alaska and Hawaii","parameter":"Basic wind speeds for Risk Category III buildings (3-second gust wind speeds at 33 ft above ground for Exposure Category C)","contour_values":[{"value":"95","unit":"mph","metric":"42 m/s"},{"value":"100","unit":"mph","metric":"45 m/s"},{"value":"105","unit":"mph","metric":"47 m/s"},{"value":"110","unit":"mph","metric":"49 m/s"},{"value":"111","unit":"mph","metric":"50 m/s"},{"value":"115","unit":"mph","metric":"51 m/s"},{"value":"120","unit":"mph","metric":"54 m/s"},{"value":"130","unit":"mph","metric":"58 m/s"},{"value":"140","unit":"mph","metric":"63 m/s"},{"value":"150","unit":"mph","metric":"67 m/s"},{"value":"160","unit":"mph","metric":"72 m/s"},{"value":"170","unit":"mph","metric":"76 m/s"}],"special_regions":"Crosshatched areas indicate special wind regions where location-specific wind speeds should be determined using the ASCE Wind Design Geodatabase"}]
elements.caption: Figure 26.5-1C. Basic wind speeds for Risk Category III buildings and other structures.

elements.text:
Notes:
1. Values are 3 s gust wind speeds in mi/h (m/s) at 33 ft (10 m) above ground for Exposure Category C.
2. Linear interpolation is permitted between contours. Point values are provided to aid with interpolation.
3. Islands, coastal areas, and land boundaries outside the last contour shall use the last wind speed contour.
4. Location-specific basic wind speeds shall be permitted to be determined using the ASCE Wind Design Geodatabase.
270
STANDARD ASCE/SEI 7-22
